name: analyze_topic
description: Perform comprehensive analysis of prediction markets with social signals and market consensus. Use this when you need deep insights beyond simple price comparison. This is more thorough than compare_markets - use compare_markets for quick odds lookup, use this for detailed analysis with sentiment data.

name: compare_markets
description: Quick side-by-side comparison of prediction markets across Polymarket (offshore: crypto, politics, sports) and Kalshi (US-regulated: economics, Fed rates). Use this for fast odds comparison and arbitrage spotting. For deeper analysis with social signals, use analyze_topic instead.

name: kalshi
description: Access Kalshi prediction markets (CFTC-regulated US market). Use this for economics-focused queries: Fed rates, GDP, CPI, inflation. For cross-platform comparison, use compare_markets instead.

action.description: Query type: 'fed' for interest rate markets, 'economics' for GDP/CPI markets, 'search' for keyword search

query.description: Search keyword (required when action='search', ignored otherwise)

name: polymarket
description: Access Polymarket prediction markets (offshore market on Polygon). Use this for crypto, politics, sports, and world events. For cross-platform comparison, use compare_markets instead.

action.description: Query type: 'trending' for hot markets, 'crypto' for cryptocurrency markets, 'search' for keyword search

query.description: Search keyword (required when action='search', ignored otherwise)

name: trending
description: Get trending prediction markets from BOTH Polymarket and Kalshi in one call. Use this to discover what's hot across all platforms. For platform-specific trending, use polymarket or kalshi with appropriate action.
